title: Additional Recipes Remake（附加配方重制版）
description: Add at least 64 new recipes and some achievements to the game
body:
#**_Intro-ENG_**：This datapack is mainly aimed at modifying formulas that are difficult to synthesize, reducing the difficulty of item production in the game, and considering that players may weaken the strength of original game props when playing certain integrated packages, the data package also includes the function of dismantling metal tools. And many basic resources in the game require players to waste unnecessary time collecting, so if the recipe synthesis in the datapack is successful, the corresponding resource quantity given will also become relatively generous. In addition, players often encounter annoying situations in certain game scenes, such as being ambushed and falling into dangerous situations. In order to cope with this situation, the datapack also provides players with some new equipment, which will be given away when players achieve achievements. The initial new version has a total of 64 formulas, while the initial old version has a total of 88 formulas. Finally, I would like to emphasize that the design goal of the datapack is to reduce the difficulty of the original game and the difficulty of synthesizing items, and to enable the original game items to also play a corresponding role in games with added mods. Players who enjoy challenges do not need to load this datapack.

简介-中文：本数据包主要针对一些难以合成的配方进行修改，降低游戏的物品制作难度，以及考虑到玩家在游玩某些整合包中会削弱原版游戏的道具强度，因此数据包中还配备拆解金属工具的功能。并且在游戏中许多基础资源需要玩家浪费不必要的时间去采集，所以数据包中的配方合成成功的话给予的对应资源数量也会变得比较阔绰。另外，玩家在某些游戏场景中经常遇到一些令人恼人的事情，比如被偷袭后陷入危险处境等，为了应对这种情况，数据包还为玩家提供一些新的装备，新装备将在等玩家在达成成就时赠送。初始的新版本一共64个配方，初始的旧版本一共88个配方。最后，我想强调的是，数据包的设计目标就是为了降低原始游戏的难度和合成物品的难度，并使原始游戏的物品在已经添加模组的游戏中也能发挥相应的作用。喜欢挑战的玩家没有必要加载此数据包。



![ENG:The amethyst block can now be disassembled(CN:紫水晶块现在可以拆解了)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2b4ef26c72ff9e1890e3971b2beb3c75f302743.png)

ENG:The amethyst block can now be disassembled(CN:紫水晶块现在可以拆解了)


![ENG:Some items that require access to the End can now be synthesized(CN:某些需要进末地才能拥有的物品现在也可以合成了)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b562eba7817587b823496a98baa6f36db5cf26bb.png)

ENG:Some items that require access to the End can now be synthesized(CN:某些需要进末地才能拥有的物品现在也可以合成了)


![ENG：Strange synthesis method^_^（CN：奇怪的合成方式^_^）](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5412d8174948491308c9f60eb9f6e8acc68678ba.png)

ENG：Strange synthesis method^_^（CN：奇怪的合成方式^_^）


![ENG：Alchemy ！(weird~)，{CN：炼金术！（才怪呢~）}](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b18f331e053187e4c6b1daa3ac5206a96300af6.png)

ENG：Alchemy ！(weird~)，{CN：炼金术！（才怪呢~）}


![ENG：Basic resources should no longer be scarce now!（CN：这下基础资源应该不会再紧缺了吧！）](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0549ed887a05fbfcb10c7db9a39c11967b38eed.png)

ENG：Basic resources should no longer be scarce now!（CN：这下基础资源应该不会再紧缺了吧！）

PS:If the system does not give away any items, please enter the reload command on the console!(如果系统没有赠送任何物品，请在控制台输入reload指令!)
